description: You are a management analyst performing a BPMN 2.0 compliance audit on a procurement workflow diagram (~/Diagrams/procurement_process.drawio) using the audit checklist at ~/Desktop/bpmn_audit_checklist.txt. Correct all BPMN 2.0 violations so the final diagram features properly separated swimlanes for the Requester, Budget Owner/Manager, Procurement Officer, and Finance/AP roles. The corrected diagram must utilize correct BPMN gateway types, labeled sequence flows on gateway exits showing conditions, a rejection path with a notification task and end event, correctly typed intermediate events, labeled data objects for key tasks, and a labeled start event. Export the final version as a PDF to ~/Diagrams/procurement_process.pdf and as a PNG to ~/Diagrams/procurement_process.png. Login: username ga, password password123.
